reviews.review_description:
I had to figure out how to select a game. You just have to point to the rock in front of you (when it is unlocked). A blue marker appears, and then you can select the game.

It is fun. A level doesn’t take that long. 
Also a good workout. 
I played it seated,  it next time gonna play standing. Think that it shall be better to hit the targets.

Throwing the ball is difficult at first but then you quickly get better at it.  Lots of different types of levels like ones with blocks and ones with enemies.  Each ball has a different use so try each ball.
